studyName: Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Late-Stage Endometrioid Endometrial Carcinoma

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site where sample was obtained, histological type of sample, tumor status of sample, primary tumor location, primary or metastatic tumor, and sequencing center of participants with endometrioid endometrial carcinoma and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Late-Stage Endometrioid Endometrial Carcinoma" project.

variables.name: BODY SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with endometrioid endometrial carcinoma and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Late-Stage Endometrioid Endometrial Carcinoma" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Sample ID, subject ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with endometrioid endometrial carcinoma and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Late-Stage Endometrioid Endometrial Carcinoma" project.

Subject ID and gender of participants with endometrioid endometrial carcinoma and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Late-Stage Endometrioid Endometrial Carcinoma" project.
